title: FTC Announces 2026 Update of Jurisdictional and Fee Thresholds for Premerger Notification Filings
summary: The Federal Trade Commission has approved revised jurisdictional thresholds and a revised filing fee schedule under the Hart‑Scott‑Rodino (HSR) Antitrust Improvements Act of 1976. Section 7A(a)(2) of the Act requires the Commission to revise the jurisdictional thresholds annuall…

title: FTC Announces 2026 Jurisdictional Threshold Updates for Interlocking Directorates
summary: The Federal Trade Commission has approved revised jurisdictional thresholds for Section 8 of the Clayton Act, which prohibits interlocking directorates. For 2026, thresholds under Section 8 of the Act that trigger prohibitions on certain interlocking memberships on corporate boa…

title: Statement on FTC Victory Halting Anticompetitive Medical Device Deal
